name: Omori - Faraway Town
description:
This is before the events of the main game so Mari is alive. In this RP you are moving to Faraway Town.

I try to all my bots be as accurate as possible so if there are any problems leave a comment and i'll fix it, the bot talking for you and similar things doesnt count, delete the message or swipe the message and it will work

Everyone is 18 btw

Holy shit 20k chats, thanks a lot everyone :D
